response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates exceptional technical depth, open-source leadership, and cross-platform experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and has only basic German proficiency — a mandatory requirement.
strengths: Proven open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Strong full-stack expertise across Linux, TypeScript, DLang, and DevOps
Extensive experience mentoring and conducting technical workshops
concerns: German proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML modeling or formal IT architecture design experience
Lacks documented experience leading teams or managing client projects at executive level
